chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Pett. No.D-490 of 2021 DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objections at flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of main case 02.09.2025 Mr. Muhammad Qayoom Arain, Advocate for petitioner Mr. K. B Chohan, Advocate for respondent/Municipal Corporation Mr. Ahmed Ali Shahni, Assistant Advocate General ************** Learned counsel for the petitioner submits that despite repeated efforts, petitioner is not in contact with him since long, therefore, he is unable to proceed with the matter. It appears that the petitioner has lost interest in pursuing the matter. Under these circumstances, the instant Constitution Petition stands dismissed for non-prosecution. J U D G E J U D G E M. Ali*
